findings.title: huggingface/diffusers
findings.description: 🤗 Diffusers: State-of-the-art diffusion models for image, video, and audio generation in PyTorch.

findings.title: PicoTrex/Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
findings.description: A curated collection of fun and creative examples generated with Nano Banana & Nano Banana Pro🍌, Gemini-2.5-flash-image based model. We also release Nano-consistent-150K openly to support the community's development of image generation and unified models(click to website to see our blog)

findings.title: zai-org/CogVideo
findings.description: text and image to video generation: CogVideoX (2024) and CogVideo (ICLR 2023)

findings.title: YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-nano-banana-pro-prompts
findings.description: 🍌 World's largest Nano Banana Pro prompt library — 10,000+ curated prompts with preview images, 16 languages. Google Gemini AI image generation. Free & open source.

findings.title: FoundationVision/VAR
findings.description: [NeurIPS 2024 Best Paper Award][GPT beats diffusion🔥] [scaling laws in visual generation📈] Official impl. of "Visual Autoregressive Modeling: Scalable Image Generation via Next-Scale Prediction". An *ultra-simple, user-friendly yet state-of-the-art* codebase for autoregressive image generation!

findings.title: brycedrennan/imaginAIry
findings.description: Pythonic AI generation of images and videos

findings.title: jamez-bondos/awesome-gpt4o-images
findings.description: Awesome curated collection of images and prompts generated by GPT-4o and gpt-image-1. Explore AI generated visuals created with ChatGPT and Sora, showcasing OpenAI’s advanced image generation capabilities.

findings.title: QwenLM/Qwen-Image
findings.description: Qwen-Image is a powerful image generation foundation model capable of complex text rendering and precise image editing.

findings.title: open-mmlab/mmagic
findings.description: OpenMMLab Multimodal Advanced, Generative, and Intelligent Creation Toolbox. Unlock the magic 🪄: Generative-AI (AIGC), easy-to-use APIs, awsome model zoo, diffusion models, for text-to-image generation, image/video restoration/enhancement, etc.

findings.title: mylxsw/aidea
findings.description: An APP that integrates mainstream large language models and image generation models, built with Flutter, with fully open-source code.

findings.title: salesforce/BLIP
findings.description: PyTorch code for BLIP: Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training for Unified Vision-Language Understanding and Generation

findings.description: Single Image to 3D using Cross-Domain Diffusion for 3D Generation

findings.description: ​​Unlimited-length talking video generation​​ that supports image-to-video and video-to-video generation

findings.title: showlab/Tune-A-Video
findings.description: [ICCV 2023] Tune-A-Video: One-Shot Tuning of Image Diffusion Models for Text-to-Video Generation

findings.title: lucidrains/deep-daze
findings.description: Simple command line tool for text to image generation using OpenAI's CLIP and Siren (Implicit neural representation network). Technique was originally created by https://twitter.com/advadnoun
